tracks.meaning: activity involving mental or physical effort done in order to achieve a purpose or result
employment or a job that a person does regularly to earn money
the functional activity of a bodily part or system
a place or establishment where goods are manufactured or assembled by machinery
the building or construction of a structure or infrastructure
intellectual or creative effort produced as a result of study or labor
a creative or artistic production such as a painting, sculpture, or piece of writing
a material or substance that is being processed or shaped
a legal suit or action brought against someone in court
the state of being in good working order or functional condition
to move gradually or persistently in a particular direction
